failures.error_message: iNova repository is not accessible in this cloud execution environment. git clone via HTTPS returns 'could not read Username for https://github.com: No such device or address'. GitHub MCP tools restricted to rsa-data-solutions/always-on-engineering-fleet only — RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova returns 'Access denied'. No tests could run.

notes: RECURRING (day 34): env_problem — iNova repo unreachable in cloud session for 34 consecutive days (2026-05-20 through 2026-06-22). Root cause: no HTTPS credentials for GitHub clone and GitHub MCP session scope excludes RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova. Fix: add RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova as a session source repo in environment config, OR provide a GITHUB_PAT with Contents read permission for iNova.
